title: Resource Geodes & Catalysts
description: Resource Geodes is a powerful modpack-focused addon that introduces renewable resource generation through configurable catalyst blocks — all deeply integrated with JEI and Jade for a polished player experience.
body:
## Resource Geodes & Catalysts

100% Dependency Free as of Version 0.3.0.

**Resource Geodes** is a powerful modpack-focused addon that introduces **renewable resource generation** through configurable catalyst blocks — all deeply integrated with **JEI** and **Jade** for a polished player experience.

At its core are **Catalysts** — unique blocks inspired by the Ore Stone variants from the Create mod. These blocks are found **embedded in geode-like structures underground**, and when **activated**, they generate valuable resources like ores or modded materials.

> Now supporting **vanilla items as custom agitators**, **full datapack-driven configuration**, and **tiered progression**!

***

### Catalyst Types
    *   Fully Data Driven, unlimited catalyst types (read the wiki)
    *   What they generate
    *   Activation requirements
    *   Cooldown and shape behavior
    *   Agitators required to activate them

**See full examples and schema:**  
[GitHub Wiki →](https://github.com/darklotus781/create-resource-geodes/wiki)

***

### Catalyst Activation

Catalysts can be activated in two ways:

#### Tier-Based Agitators

Use a **Catalyst Agitator** item (Tier 1–4) that meets or exceeds the catalyst's required tier.

#### Custom Item Agitators

Define any **vanilla or modded item** (e.g., `minecraft:gunpowder`) as the required agitator via JSON — no custom item class needed.

> Tier and custom agitator systems are **mutually exclusive per catalyst**.

Catalysts regenerate resources in customizable **spheres or cubes**, using a cooldown system and visual feedback.

***

### Crafting & Tools

*   **Catalyst Core**: A craftable item used to create catalysts if enabled. Default recipes are included but can be overridden with KubeJS or datapacks.
*   **Catalyst Agitator**: A special item used to **activate catalysts** and trigger resource generation. Comes in **four tiers**, with only Tier 1 having a default recipe. Higher tiers can be defined and gated via modpack progression.
*   **Catalyst Activator Wand**: A handheld tool that **teleports catalysts** to nearby valid locations or if it was player placed, can make it drop as an item (break mode).  The default recipe requires two shafts and a gem which are found in **Mineshaft** chest and as a drop from the **Warden**.  You may also find a full wand in **End City Treasure**.  The **Wandering Trader** may also sell some items.

***

### Modpack-Friendly Features

Built for modpack creators:

*   **Fully data-driven** via JSON
*   **JEI & Jade integration** out of the box
*   **Custom item support** for vanilla/modded agitators
*   **Tunable cooldowns, shapes, density, and sounds**

Everything from activation logic to structure generation is configurable.

***

### 💬 Need Help?

If you have any questions, suggestions, or would like to share your creations,  
join us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/XH7zCjgUHb) — we'd love to see what you're building!
